title: Principal Frontend Developer at VMware India Advisory Limited

jsonLd.title: Principal Frontend Developer at VMware India Advisory Limited
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Frontend Developer looking for your next big career move? VMware India Advisory Limited in Raipur offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About VMware India Advisory Limited:
VMware India Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Node.js

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with VMware India Advisory Limited!
